No Poverty.reason: While tax fairness can indirectly support pro-poor policies, the course syllabus does not explicitly link 'ability-to-pay' principles to poverty eradication or specific pro-poor fiscal frameworks.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is fundamentally about 'Taxation Law,' covering 'rule of tax law' and 'tax relief,' which are core to promoting the rule of law and strong institutions (Targets 16.3, 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The entire course on 'Taxation Law' directly addresses domestic resource mobilization, which is the primary mechanism for achieving Target 17.1.
